title: SnowFlakes
description: The mod adds falling snowflakes to the main menu, network game and player inventory, they also interact with the mouse cursor
body: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PPEJ28NFJY8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>This mod adds beautiful falling snowflakes to the main menu, they are also there when you click on the network game and when you play they are in the player's inventory (survival/creative). They are repelled by your cursor, which makes them more dynamic. The idea of ​​the mod was inspired by the old mod under the name "SnowTime". As a result, I made a similar, improved mod for the new version
